dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes entering after 40% of intraday range has moved (momentum zone) and exiting at 40% profit or momentum divergence. Used MACD histogram as momentum acceleration indicator (crosses zero for inflection points). Range operator approximates the 40% intraday range threshold. Returns metric captures the 40% profit target. Time-based and absolute stop-loss constraints encoded as max hold duration (8 hours) and stop_loss_pct (4R). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the rule applies to both long and short entries depending on momentum direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes entering after 40% of intraday range has moved (momentum zone) and exiting at 40% profit or momentum divergence. Used MACD histogram as momentum acceleration indicator (crosses zero for inflection points). Range operator approximates the 40% intraday range threshold. Returns metric captures the 40% profit target. Time-based and absolute stop-loss constraints encoded as max hold duration (8 hours) and stop_loss_pct (4R). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the rule applies to both long and short entries depending on momentum direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter only in the zone of greatest momentum/highest probability and exit before the move exhausts, rather than attempting to capture the entire move from extreme to extreme.
